title: Complete Web Development Bootcamp
description: Learn full-stack web development with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Node.js, and MongoDB.

title: UI/UX Design Masterclass
description: Master user interface and user experience design principles using Figma and modern design systems.

title: Digital Marketing Strategy
description: Learn SEO, social media marketing, content strategy, and online advertising from scratch.

title: Data Science & Machine Learning
description: Build machine learning models and analyze real-world datasets using Python and popular libraries.

title: Mobile App Development with Flutter
description: Create beautiful and responsive mobile apps for Android and iOS using Flutter and Dart.

title: Graphic Design Essentials
description: Learn typography, color theory, branding, and visual design using Adobe Photoshop and Illustrator.
